name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The land was red and dead and parched, and good wood was hard to come by. Her foragers returned with gnarled cottonwoods, purple brush, sheaves of brown grass. They took the two straightest trees, hacked the limbs and branches from them, skinned off their bark, and split them, laying the logs in a square. Its center they filled with straw, brush, bark shavings, and bundles of dry grass. Rakharo chose a stallion from the small herd that remained to them; he was not the equal of Khal Drogo’s red, but few horses were. In the center of the square, Aggo fed him a withered apple and dropped him in an instant with an axe blow between the eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: 在red、dead、parched土地上，Daenerys的人用稀缺木材搭pyre，并以斧击杀stallion作为葬礼准备。
blocks.literary_note_zh: pyre从贫瘠地景中的零碎材料搭起，创造行为不是凭空发生，而以最后资源和一匹horse为代价。
blocks.background_zh: **Dothraki pyre：** khal死后与horse及个人treasures露天火葬，使其在night lands继续骑行。

blocks.original_text: Bound hand and foot, Mirri Maz Duur watched from the dust with disquiet in her black eyes. “It is not enough to kill a horse,” she told Dany. “By itself, the blood is nothing. You do not have the words to make a spell, nor the wisdom to find them. Do you think bloodmagic is a game for children? You call me maegi as if it were a curse, but all it means is wise. You are a child, with a child’s ignorance. Whatever you mean to do, it will not work. Loose me from these bonds and I will help you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 被绑的Mirri警告只有horse blood不足以施法，嘲讽Daenerys是无知child，并提出释放自己即可帮助。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Mirri用child否定Daenerys的knowledge；本章后续反复以child/grow回答她，但不能因此自动正当化Mirri遭受的处置。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “I am tired of the maegi’s braying,” Dany told Jhogo. He took his whip to her, and after that the godswife kept silent.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys厌烦Mirri说话，命Jhogo以whip迫使她沉默。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Over the carcass of the horse, they built a platform of hewn logs; trunks of smaller trees and limbs from the greater, and the thickest straightest branches they could find. They laid the wood east to west, from sunrise to sunset. On the platform they piled Khal Drogo’s treasures: his great tent, his painted vests, his saddles and harness, the whip his father had given him when he came to manhood, the arakh he had used to slay Khal Ogo and his son, a mighty dragonbone bow. Aggo would have added the weapons Drogo’s bloodriders had given Dany for bride gifts as well, but she forbade it. “Those are mine,” she told him, “and I mean to keep them.” Another layer of brush was piled about the khal’s treasures, and bundles of dried grass scattered over them.
blocks.explanation_zh: 众人把Drogo的tent、衣物、鞍具、成年whip、arakh与dragonbone bow置上pyre；Daenerys保留属于自己的bride gifts。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys保留bride gifts，表明葬礼不是把自身也完全交给Drogo，而是在继承其军事符号。
blocks.background_zh: **bride gifts：** whip、bow、arakh原由Drogo bloodriders赠给Daenerys，因此她主张属于自己而不随葬。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah Mormont drew her aside as the sun was creeping toward its zenith. “Princess . . . ” he began.
blocks.explanation_zh: 正午将近时Jorah把Daenerys拉到一旁，仍称她Princess。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Why do you call me that?” Dany challenged him. “My brother Viserys was your king, was he not?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys挑战这个称呼，追问Viserys是否曾是Jorah的king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “He was, my lady.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah确认。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Viserys is dead. I am his heir, the last blood of House Targaryen. Whatever was his is mine now.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys宣布Viserys死后自己是House Targaryen最后血脉和继承人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “My . . . queen,” Ser Jorah said, going to one knee. “My sword that was his is yours, Dacnerys. And my heart as well, that never belonged to your brother. I am only a knight, and I have nothing to offer you but exile, but I beg you, hear me. Let Khal Drogo go. You shall not be alone. I promise you, no man shall take you to Vaes Dothrak unless you wish to go. You need not join the dosh khaleen. Come east with me. Yi Ti, Qarth, the Jade Sea, Asshai by the Shadow. We will see all the wonders yet unseen, and drink what wines the gods see fit to serve us. Please, Khaleesi. I know what you intend. Do not. Do not.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah改口称Queen并跪下，献上sword与heart，恳求她放下Drogo、不要登pyre，愿带她去east自由生活；页面将Daenerys误排为Dacnerys。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah从Princess改Queen完成语言上的主权转移；Dacnerys为页面原有拼写异常。
blocks.background_zh: **Targaryen succession claim：** Viserys死后，Daenerys把其dynastic claim和Jorah效忠一并继承。

blocks.original_text: “I must,” Dany told him. She touched his face, fondly, sadly. “You do not understand.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys温柔而悲伤地说自己必须完成计划，Jorah并不理解。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “I understand that you loved him,” Ser Jorah said in a voice thick with despair. “I loved my lady wife once, yet I did not die with her. You are my queen, my sword is yours, but do not ask me to stand aside as you climb on Drogo’s pyre. I will not watch you burn.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah以自己曾失去wife却继续活着为例，拒绝旁观Daenerys自焚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah误读计划为suicide并非毫无根据，Daenerys刻意不解释真实意图，因为她自己也只能以行动验证。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Is that what you fear?” Dany kissed him lightly on his broad forehead. “I am not such a child as that, sweet ser.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys确认他只怕这个，并说自己并非那样的child。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “You do not mean to die with him? You swear it, my queen?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah追问她是否发誓不与Drogo同死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 在贫瘠土地上搭建Drogo pyre；Daenerys以Viserys继承人身份要求Queen称号，Jorah怕她自焚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “I swear it,” she said in the Common Tongue of the Seven Kingdoms that by rights were hers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys用Common Tongue发誓，并在内心把Seven Kingdoms视为自己的right。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 用Common Tongue宣誓把对Jorah的私人保证与Seven Kingdoms claim连接。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: The third level of the platform was woven of branches no thicker than a finger, and covered with dry leaves and twigs. They laid them north to south, from ice to fire, and piled them high with soft cushions and sleeping silks. The sun had begun to lower toward the west by the time they were done. Dany called the Dothraki around her. Fewer than a hundred were left. How many had Aegon started with? she wondered. It did not matter.
blocks.explanation_zh: pyre第三层按north-south、ice-fire方向铺设；不到百名Dothraki围拢，Daenerys想到Aegon起步人数却不再在意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: north to south/from ice to fire把pyre空间化为全书两大地理意象，但当前只作仪式方向理解。
blocks.background_zh: **Aegon comparison：** Daenerys想到Aegon conquest起步规模，以少数followers并不必然阻止王权自我想象。

blocks.original_text: “You will be my khalasar,” she told them. “I see the faces of slaves. I free you. Take off your collars. Go if you wish, no one shall harm you. If you stay, it will be as brothers and sisters, husbands and wives.” The black eyes watched her, wary, expressionless. “I see the children, women, the wrinkled faces of the aged. I was a child yesterday. Today I am a woman. Tomorrow I will be old. To each of you I say, give me your hands and your hearts, and there will always be a place for you.” She turned to the three young warriors of her khas. “Jhogo, to you I give the silver-handled whip that was my bride gift, and name you ko, and ask your oath, that you will live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并邀请自愿留下者组成新khalasar，又把whip给Jhogo、命他成为ko并宣bloodrider oath。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 先free再邀请留下，试图把slave ownership改造为consent-based allegiance；众人的沉默说明同意尚未立即形成。
blocks.background_zh: **manumission：** Daenerys口头解除collars并允许离开，尝试让留下变成自愿；真实可行性仍受荒地资源和依附关系限制。

blocks.original_text: Jhogo took the whip from her hands, but his face was confused. “Khaleesi, “ he said hesitantly, “this is not done. It would shame me, to be bloodrider to a woman.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhogo困惑地说传统不允许woman拥有bloodrider，接受会使自己蒙羞；源页引号方向异常。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jhogo的拒绝不是个人怯懦，而是Dothraki gender rule：woman不被承认为khal或bloodrider leader。
blocks.background_zh: **bloodrider rule：** ko通常由male khal命名，分享保护、复仇和生死义务；woman khalasar在Dothraki传统中不被承认。

blocks.original_text: “Aggo,” Dany called, paying no heed to Jhogo’s words. If I look back I am lost. “To you I give the dragonbone bow that was my bride gift.” It was double-curved, shiny black and exquisite, taller than she was. “I name you ko, and ask your oath, that you should live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys无视拒绝，以If I look back I am lost继续，把dragonbone bow给Aggo并要求同一oath。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Aggo accepted the bow with lowered eyes. “I cannot say these words. Only a man can lead a khalasar or name a ko.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aggo低眼接受bow，却说只有man能lead khalasar或name ko。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Rakharo,” Dany said, turning away from the refusal, “you shall have the great arakh that was my bride gift, with hilt and blade chased in gold. And you too I name my ko, and ask that you live and die as blood of my blood, riding at my side to keep me safe from harm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys转向Rakharo，把gold-chased arakh给他并继续命名ko。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “You are khaleesi,” Rakharo said, taking the arakh. “I shall ride at your side to Vaes Dothrak beneath the Mother of Mountains, and keep you safe from harm until you take your place with the crones of the dosh khaleen. No more can I promise.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Rakharo只承诺护送她到Vaes Dothrak加入dosh khaleen，拒绝承认更广bloodrider义务。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: **dosh khaleen destination：** Drogo widow按传统应赴Vaes Dothrak加入widowed khaleesi council，Rakharo只承诺护送至此。

blocks.original_text: She nodded, as calmly as if she had not heard his answer, and turned to the last of her champions. “Ser Jorah Mormont,” she said, “first and greatest of my knights, I have no bride gift to give you, but I swear to you, one day you shall have from my hands a longsword like none the world has ever seen, dragon-forged and made of Valyrian steel. And I would ask for your oath as well.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys仿佛没听见拒绝，许诺未来给Jorah一柄dragon-forged Valyrian steel sword并索要oath。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 对Jorah的未来Valyrian sword承诺仍无法立即兑现，却创造Queensguard制度雏形。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “You have it, my queen,” Ser Jorah said, kneeling to lay his sword at her feet. “I vow to serve you, to obey you, to die for you if need be.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah跪下放剑，发誓serve、obey，并在必要时为她死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Whatever may come?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys确认无论发生什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Whatever may come.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah重复Whatever may come。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys释放slaves并试图任命三名Dothraki ko，遭gender tradition拒绝；Jorah却立誓成为首位Queensguard。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “I shall hold you to that oath. I pray you never regret the giving of it.” Dany lifted him to his feet. Stretching on her toes to reach his lips, she kissed the knight gently and said, “You are the first of my Queensguard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys警告会要求履誓，并任命Jorah为首位Queensguard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Whatever may come很快被Mirri命令检验，oath的空白范围让Jorah必须执行自己反感之事。
blocks.background_zh: **Queensguard：** Daenerys仿照Kingsguard命名自己的royal guard；本章首位成员为Jorah。

blocks.original_text: She could feel the eyes of the khalasar on her as she entered her tent. The Dothraki were muttering and giving her strange sideways looks from the corners of their dark almond eyes. They thought her mad, Dany realized. Perhaps she was. She would know soon enough. If I look back I am lost.
blocks.explanation_zh: Dothraki侧目低语，认为Daenerys发疯；她承认可能如此，但很快便会知道。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Perhaps she was保留Daenerys自身不确定性；叙事没有在奇迹发生前让她拥有全知把握。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Her bath was scalding hot when Irri helped her into the tub, but Dany did not flinch or cry aloud. She liked the heat. It made her feel clean. Jhiqui had scented the water with the oils she had found in the market in Vaes Dothrak; the steam rose moist and fragrant. Doreah washed her hair and combed it out, working loose the mats and tangles. Irri scrubbed her back. Dany closed her eyes and let the smell and the warmth enfold her. She could feel the heat soaking through the soreness between her thighs. She shuddered when it entered her, and her pain and stiffness seemed to dissolve. She floated.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys以scalding bath清洁身体，热度缓解产后疼痛，也像进入仪式前的净化。
blocks.literary_note_zh: scalding heat与cleanliness既是产后身体照护，也预演她主动接近fire。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.literary_note_zh: 敏感内容省略；关键是Daenerys通过Drogo气味和hair完成告别，并承认bloodmagic price过高。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Dany braided his hair and slid the silver rings onto his mustache and hung his bells one by one. So many bells, gold and silver and bronze. Bells so his enemies would hear him coming and grow weak with fear. She dressed him in horsehair leggings and high boots, buckling a belt heavy with gold and silver medallions about his waist. Over his scarred chest she slipped a painted vest, old and faded, the one Drogo had loved best. For herself she chose loose sandsilk trousers, sandals that laced halfway up her legs, and a vest like Drogo’s.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys给Drogo编发、挂回bells并穿上最爱的旧vest，自己也选择相似衣装。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她沐浴净身、为Drogo完成葬仪，并拒绝出售dragon eggs，将三枚eggs置于pyre。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: The sun was going down when she called them back to carry his body to the pyre. The Dothraki watched in silence as Jhogo and Aggo bore him from the tent. Dany walked behind them. They laid him down on his cushions and silks, his head toward the Mother of Mountains far to the northeast.
blocks.explanation_zh: 日落时Jhogo和Aggo把Drogo抬上pyre，头朝Mother of Mountains。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她沐浴净身、为Drogo完成葬仪，并拒绝出售dragon eggs，将三枚eggs置于pyre。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Oil,” she commanded, and they brought forth the jars and poured them over the pyre, soaking the silks and the brush and the bundles of dry grass, until the oil trickled from beneath the logs and the air was rich with fragrance. “Bring my eggs,” Dany commanded her handmaids. Something in her voice made them run.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys命人倒oil浸透pyre，再以不容置疑语气叫handmaids拿dragon eggs。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bring my eggs的voice让handmaids奔跑，显示她在followers尚未宣誓前已开始行使command presence。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah took her arm. “My queen, Drogo will have no use for dragon’s eggs in the night lands. Better to sell them in Asshai. Sell one and we can buy a ship to take us back to the Free Cities. Sell all three and you will be a wealthy woman all your days.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah劝她别把eggs陪葬，卖掉即可买船和获得终身财富。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah按exchange value看eggs，Daenerys按gift purpose与潜在生命意义看，双方理性框架不同。
blocks.background_zh: **egg value：** 作为petrified dragon eggs已极其昂贵，Jorah认为出售即可获得船与财富。

blocks.original_text: “They were not given to me to sell,” Dany told him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys说eggs不是为了出售才送给自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她沐浴净身、为Drogo完成葬仪，并拒绝出售dragon eggs，将三枚eggs置于pyre。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: She climbed the pyre herself to place the eggs around her sun-and-stars. The black beside his heart, under his arm. The green beside his head, his braid coiled around it. The cream-and-gold down between his legs. When she kissed him for the last time, Dany could taste the sweetness of the oil on his lips.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她亲自把black、green、cream-gold eggs放在Drogo身体周围，并最后亲吻。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三枚eggs围绕Drogo摆放成ritual arrangement；文本不提供可重复的bloodmagic procedure。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: As she climbed down off the pyre, she noticed Mirri Maz Duur watching her. “You are mad,” the godswife said hoarsely.
blocks.explanation_zh: Mirri看着她下pyre，沙哑断言她疯了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys以绝对oath迫使Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre，把其life视作bloodmagic price，并以red comet为sign。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Is it so far from madness to wisdom?” Dany asked. “Ser Jorah, take this maegi and bind her to the pyre.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys反问madness与wisdom距离多远，命Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre。
blocks.literary_note_zh: madness/wisdom反问回应Mirri开章‘maegi means wise’，夺回谁有资格定义knowledge。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “To the . . . my queen, no, hear me . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah震惊并试图反对。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys以绝对oath迫使Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre，把其life视作bloodmagic price，并以red comet为sign。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “Do as I say.” Still he hesitated, until her anger flared. “You swore to obey me, whatever might come. Rakharo, help him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys以他刚立的obey oath强迫执行，并命Rakharo协助。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys用刚索取的absolute oath压制Jorah良知，显示新权力从诞生起就包含coercion。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: The godswife did not cry out as they dragged her to Khal Drogo’s pyre and staked her down amidst his treasures. Dany poured the oil over the woman’s head herself. “I thank you, Mirri Maz Duur,” she said, “for the lessons you have taught me.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Mirri被拖上pyre固定；Daenerys亲手浇oil，并感谢她教会的lessons。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys以绝对oath迫使Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre，把其life视作bloodmagic price，并以red comet为sign。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “You will not hear me scream,” Mirri responded as the oil dripped from her hair and soaked her clothing.
blocks.explanation_zh: Mirri说Daenerys不会听见自己尖叫。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys以绝对oath迫使Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre，把其life视作bloodmagic price，并以red comet为sign。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: “I will,” Dany said, “but it is not your screams I want, only your life. I remember what you told me. Only death can pay for life.” Mirri Maz Duur opened her mouth, but made no reply. As she stepped away, Dany saw that the contempt was gone from the maegi’s flat black eyes; in its place was something that might have been fear. Then there was nothing to be done but watch the sun and look for the first star.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys说想要的不是screams而是life，引用only death can pay for life；Mirri的contempt转为可能的fear。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她把Mirri life当作payment，是Daenerys对only death can pay for life的应用，不等于客观宇宙规则已被完整解释。
blocks.background_zh: **bloodmagic phrase：** Only death can pay for life来自Mirri前章说明；Daenerys现在反向用于Mirri。

blocks.original_text: When a horselord dies, his horse is slain with him, so he might ride proud into the night lands. The bodies are burned beneath the open sky, and the khal rises on his fiery steed to take his place among the stars. The more fiercely the man burned in life, the brighter his star will shine in the darkness.
blocks.explanation_zh: 正文解释Dothraki khal funeral：horse同焚，使死者骑fiery steed进入night lands成为star。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys以绝对oath迫使Jorah把Mirri绑上pyre，把其life视作bloodmagic price，并以red comet为sign。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Jhogo spied it first. “There,” he said in a hushed voice. Dany looked and saw it, low in the east. The first star was a comet, burning red. Bloodred; fire red; the dragon’s tail. She could not have asked for a stronger sign.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhogo看见东方第一颗star其实是bloodred comet；Daenerys把它解释为dragon’s tail和最强sign。
blocks.literary_note_zh: comet是可见天象；称dragon’s tail和sign属于Daenerys的interpretation。
blocks.background_zh: **red comet：** 东方低空可见的红色comet；‘dragon’s tail’是Daenerys赋予的象征名称。

blocks.original_text: Dany took the torch from Aggo’s hand and thrust it between the logs. The oil took the fire at once, the brush and dried grass a heartbeat later. Tiny flames went darting up the wood like swift red mice, skating over the oil and leaping from bark to branch to leaf. A rising heat puffed at her face, soft and sudden as a lover’s breath, but in seconds it had grown too hot to bear. Dany stepped backward. The wood crackled, louder and louder. Mirri Maz Duur began to sing in a shrill, ululating voice. The flames whirled and writhed, racing each other up the platform. The dusk shimmered as the air itself seemed to liquefy from the heat. Dany heard logs spit and crack. The fires swept over Mirri Maz Duur. Her song grew louder, shriller . . . then she gasped, again and again, and her song became a shuddering wail, thin and high and full of agony.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys点燃pyre，oil、brush和wood迅速燃烧；Mirri歌声最终变成痛苦wail。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Mirri燃烧写得漫长而痛苦，阻止读者把dragon birth只当无代价奇观。
blocks.background_zh: **execution and ritual：** Mirri未同意成为sacrifice，且Jorah最初反对；这是强制处决，不应只以奇迹结果消解伦理。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: explicit sexualized fantasy involving a minor and a deceased person. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：涉及未成年角色与死者的露骨性想象。段落位置保留。] Daenerys在火包围Drogo时短暂产生与他同归的冲动。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 敏感想象省略；功能是Jorah对suicide的担忧一度可能成真，但Daenerys没有停在与Drogo合一。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: She could smell the odor of burning flesh, no different than horseflesh roasting in a firepit. The pyre roared in the deepening dusk like some great beast, drowning out the fainter sound of Mirri Maz Duur’s screaming and sending up long tongues of flame to lick at the belly of the night. As the smoke grew thicker, the Dothraki backed away, coughing. Huge orange gouts of fire unfurled their banners in that hellish wind, the logs hissing and cracking, glowing cinders rising on the smoke to float away into the dark like so many newborn fireflies. The heat beat at the air with great red wings, driving the Dothraki back, driving off even Mormont, but Dany stood her ground. She was the blood of the dragon, and the fire was in her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 燃烧肉味与巨兽般pyre迫使Dothraki和Jorah后退，Daenerys却以blood of the dragon自我理解站住。
blocks.literary_note_zh: blood of the dragon从genealogy claim转为耐火行动信念；她此前brazier经历并不足以证明能在pyre无伤。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: She had sensed the truth of it long ago, Dany thought as she took a step closer to the conflagration, but the brazier had not been hot enough. The flames writhed before her like the women who had danced at her wedding, whirling and singing and spinning their yellow and orange and crimson veils, fearsome to behold, yet lovely, so lovely, alive with heat. Dany opened her arms to them, her skin flushed and glowing. This is a wedding, too, she thought. Mirri Maz Duur had fallen silent. The godswife thought her a child, but children grow, and children learn.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她靠近conflagration，认为早先brazier不足以验证truth；把火焰看成婚礼舞者，并说children会成长学习。
blocks.literary_note_zh: This is a wedding把Drogo funeral、旧wedding和Daenerys与dragon/fire的新结合叠加。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: Another step, and Dany could feel the heat of the sand on the soles of her feet, even through her sandals. Sweat ran down her thighs and between her breasts and in rivulets over her cheeks, where tears had once run. Ser Jorah was shouting behind her, but he did not matter anymore, only the fire mattered. The flames were so beautiful, the loveliest things she had ever seen, each one a sorcerer robed in yellow and orange and scarlet, swirling long smoky cloaks. She saw crimson firelions and great yellow serpents and unicorns made of pale blue flame; she saw fish and foxes and monsters, wolves and bright birds and flowering trees, each more beautiful than the last. She saw a horse, a great grey stallion limned in smoke, its flowing mane a nimbus of blue flame. Yes, my love, my sun-and-stars, yes, mount now, ride now.
blocks.explanation_zh: 火焰在她眼中化为lions、serpents、wolves、birds、trees和Drogo的smoky stallion，Jorah呼喊已失去重要性。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 火焰动物可能来自热、烟与意识状态的视觉解释；Drogo stallion是Daenerys主观vision。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: nudity and sexualized bodily description involving a minor. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：涉及未成年角色的裸体与性化身体描写。段落位置保留。] Daenerys更靠近火，并看见Drogo幻象挥whip。
blocks.literary_note_zh: pyre燃烧、Mirri死亡、eggs三次裂开；Daenerys把火视作wedding并主动走入firestorm。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: She heard a crack, the sound of shattering stone. The platform of wood and brush and grass began to shift and collapse in upon itself. Bits of burning wood slid down at her, and Dany was showered with ash and cinders. And something else came crashing down, bouncing and rolling, to land at her feet; a chunk of curved rock, pale and veined with gold, broken and smoking. The roaring filled the world, yet dimly through the firefall Dany heard women shriek and children cry out in wonder.
blocks.explanation_zh: 第一声stone crack后pyre坍塌，pale-gold curved shell碎片滚到脚边，旁观者惊叫。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 第一crack与curved shell明确把egg孵化从象征推进为物理事件。
blocks.background_zh: **first hatching evidence：** curved pale-gold shell碎片与crack提供egg破裂的直接物理迹象。

blocks.original_text: Only death can pay for life.
blocks.explanation_zh: Only death can pay for life作为独立refrain出现。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 独立句像ritual equation，但life/death对应关系仍由Daenerys理解组织。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: And there came a second crack, loud and sharp as thunder, and the smoke stirred and whirled around her and the pyre shifted, the logs exploding as the fire touched their secret hearts. She heard the screams of frightened horses, and the voices of the Dothraki raised in shouts of fear and terror, and Ser Jorah calling her name and cursing. No, she wanted to shout to him, no, my good knight, do not fear for me. The fire is mine. I am Daenerys Stormborn, daughter of dragons, bride of dragons, mother of dragons, don’t you see? Don’t you SEE? With a belch of flame and smoke that reached thirty feet into the sky, the pyre collapsed and came down around her. Unafraid, Dany stepped forward into the firestorm, calling to her children.
blocks.explanation_zh: 第二声crack伴随恐慌；Daenerys自称Stormborn、daughter/bride/mother of dragons，主动步入firestorm。
blocks.literary_note_zh: mother of dragons先作为Daenerys在极端时刻的自称，下一段后的结果才提供外部验证。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: The third crack was as loud and sharp as the breaking of the world.
blocks.explanation_zh: 第三声crack被比作world breaking。
blocks.literary_note_zh: pyre燃烧、Mirri死亡、eggs三次裂开；Daenerys把火视作wedding并主动走入firestorm。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: nudity involving a minor. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：涉及未成年角色裸体。段落位置保留。] 火灭后Jorah在ashes中发现Daenerys无伤，周围是焚毁遗骸。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 敏感裸体省略；核心事实是Daenerys处于火场中心却unhurt，hair与clothes焚毁。
blocks.background_zh: **fire outcome：** Daenerys衣发焚毁却身体无伤；这是角色们可共同观察的异常事件。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: nude breastfeeding imagery involving a minor. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：涉及未成年角色裸体哺乳场景。段落位置保留。] 三只新生dragons分别依附在Daenerys身上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 敏感裸体哺乳省略；核心事实是三只活dragons已孵化并依附她。
blocks.background_zh: **内容安全：** 原段含未成年角色裸体哺乳描写，不复录；保留三只dragons的颜色、位置关系与孵化事实。

blocks.original_text: Wordless, the knight fell to his knees. The men of her khas came up behind him. Jhogo was the first to lay his arakh at her feet. “Blood of my blood,” he murmured, pushing his face to the smoking earth. “Blood of my blood,” she heard Aggo echo. “Blood of my blood,” Rakharo shouted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah无言跪下，Jhogo、Aggo、Rakharo依次伏地宣称Blood of my blood。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 先前拒绝成为woman bloodriders的三人现在主动宣誓，奇迹改变了文化可接受性和power relation。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: And after them came her handmaids, and then the others, all the Dothraki, men and women and children, and Dany had only to look at their eyes to know that they were hers now, today and tomorrow and forever, hers as they had never been Drogo’s.
blocks.explanation_zh: handmaids及全体Dothraki随后归附；Daenerys从眼神中知道他们如今真正属于她。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ‘hers as never Drogo’s’把khalasar基础从继承Drogo改成对Daenerys个人的charismatic allegiance。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Daenerys继承王权、挑战Dothraki gender tradition、Drogo funeral、Mirri sacrifice与dragon hatching。

blocks.original_text: As Daenerys Targaryen rose to her feet, her black hissed, pale smoke venting from its mouth and nostrils. The other two pulled away from her breasts and added their voices to the call, translucent wings unfolding and stirring the air, and for the first time in hundreds of years, the night came alive with the music of dragons.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys起身，三只dragons展开translucent wings并发声；数百年来dragon music首次使夜晚复苏。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 最终music不是比喻性希望而已：三只可观察生物共同发声，dragon extinction在当前场景被事实性逆转。
blocks.background_zh: **dragon return：** 最后一段明确三只dragons展开翅膀并发声，结束数百年无活dragon的时代。
